title: TORified
description: Allows you to connect to servers via Tor (basically a free VPN)
body:
# Torified
Allows you to connect to Minecraft servers via Tor
## Prerequisites
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/)
- [Tor](https://www.torproject.org/download/tor/) (recommended) or [Tor Browser](https://www.torproject.org/download)
## How To Use

**If you're using Tor:** Run "tor/tor" on Linux and Mac, or "tor/tor.exe" on Windows.
(Note: If it doesn't start on Linux, try prepending `LD_PRELOAD=./libevent-2.1.so.7`.)

**If you're using Tor Browser:** Go to the path where you installed Tor Browser and from there go to Browser/TorBrowser/Tor, then run the program in that directory.

Once it finishes starting, you will be able to use Torified. Enable or disable its usage in the top right corner.

If you try to connect using Tor and Tor is not running, it will fail to connect.
